description:
Exercise patient authentication and protected product routes in a browser while keeping live Cognito usage out of the default local suite.

**Scope**
- Cover sign-up, sign-in, reset-password, verify-email, sign-out, and signed-out redirect behavior for `/account`, `/dashboard`, `/billing`, and onboarding routes.
- Use a deterministic local auth test seam or mocked Cognito session fixture for default E2E runs.
- Add an optional staging smoke profile that can use approved secret-store test credentials without committing credentials or relying on real patient data.
- Assert secure session-cookie behavior and redirect gating at the browser level, complementing the existing Vitest contracts.

**Acceptance**
- Default auth E2E specs run locally without live Cognito credentials.
- Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users and allow authenticated synthetic sessions to reach the expected shell/state.
- Sign-out clears the browser session and returns protected routes to signed-out behavior.
- Any staging credentials are referenced only through environment variables or approved secret retrieval, never fixtures committed to the repo.
title: Auth and protected-route E2E specs with Cognito-safe test seams
